response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo has an impressive 15+ years of software engineering experience across diverse domains, including AI-agent infrastructure and cloud technologies. Her work on GISCollective demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative, and her technical breadth (TypeScript, D, Java, etc.) aligns well with the role's requirements. However, her resume lacks explicit AI/ML expertise, AI-powered product development, or entrepreneurial experience within larger organizations, which are preferred qualifications. Her recent AI-agent work is promising but not yet a clear differentiator.
strengths: 17+ years of deep software engineering experience across full-stack, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Entrepreneurial background with GISCollective and startup-like initiative
Strong polyglot programming skills (TypeScript, D, Java, etc.) and cloud-native tooling (Docker, Kubernetes)
concerns: No clear evidence of AI/ML expertise or AI-powered product development in prior roles
Lacks a Master's/PhD in AI or recognized AI leadership (e.g., publications, open-source AI projects)
Recent AI-agent work is promising but insufficient to demonstrate strategic AI innovation at director level
